events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young today! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. Still got those moves!

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with its first video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV's First Video
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Forty-five years ago today, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' kicked it all off. What a statement!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival of Music & Art began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Remembering 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music continues to inspire and entertain millions worldwide.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting (1996)
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in Las Vegas. He would pass away six days later.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years ago today, the music world lost a giant. Remembering the incredible legacy of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970, aged 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost a true guitar hero. Jimi Hendrix's influence is still felt in music today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic album cover and timeless tracks. What's your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and frontwoman of The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll attitude.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with so much power and hope.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the very first iPod, revolutionising how we listen to music, on this day in 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the original iPod dropped and changed music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 64 years of 007. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles' 'White Album' dropped. So many incredible tracks on one record. What's your highlight?
